assessment_objectives.objective: an organization-wide strategy for managing supply chain risks is developed.
supply chain risks associated with organizational systems and system components are identified.
the supply chain risk management strategy is implemented consistently across the organization.
a plan for managing supply chain risks is developed.
security requirements to protect against supply chain risks to the system, system components, or system services and to limit the harm or consequences from supply chain-related events are defined.
the supply chain risk management strategy is reviewed / updated per an organization-defined frequency or as required to address organizational changes.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters:
at least every 12 months, or when there are significant
incidents or significant changes to risks

assessment_objectives.objective: the frequency at which to review and update the supply chain risk management plan is defined.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters:
at least every 12 months, or when there are significant
incidents or significant changes to risks

assessment_objectives.objective: the plan for managing supply chain risks is updated frequently.
the SCRM plan addresses risks associated with the research and development of the system, system components, or system services.
the SCRM plan addresses risks associated with the design of the system, system components, or system services.
the SCRM plan addresses risks associated with the manufacturing of the system, system components, or system services.
the SCRM plan addresses risks associated with the acquisition of the system, system components, or system services.
the SCRM plan addresses risks associated with the delivery of the system, system components, or system services.
the SCRM plan addresses risks associated with the integration of the system, system components, or system services.
the SCRM plan addresses risks associated with the operation of the system, system components, or system services.
the SCRM plan addresses risks associated with the maintenance of the system, system components, or system services.
the SCRM plan addresses risks associated with the disposal of the system, system components, or system services.
the SCRM plan is reviewed per an organization-defined frequency.
the SCRM plan is updated per an organization-defined frequency.
the SCRM plan is protected from unauthorized disclosure.
the supply chain risk management plan is protected from unauthorized modification.
Operations Security (OPSEC) controls to protect supply chain-related information for the system, system component or system service are defined.
OPSEC controls are employed to protect supply chain-related information for the system, system component or system service.
the risk (including supply chain risk) of unauthorized disclosure resulting from the processing, storage, or transmission of sensitive / regulated data is assessed.
a process for identifying weaknesses or deficiencies in the supply chain elements and processes is established.

organization-defined security requirements are enforced to protect against supply chain risks to the system, system components, or system services and to limit the harm or consequences of supply chain-related events.
a process for addressing weaknesses or deficiencies in the supply chain elements and processes is established.
the risk (including supply chain risk) of unauthorized disclosure resulting from the processing, storage, or transmission of CUI is assessed.
the SCRM plan is reviewed <A.03.17.01.ODP[01]: frequency>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at least every 12 months, or when there are significant incidents or significant changes to risks

assessment_objectives.objective: the SCRM plan is updated <A.03.17.01.ODP[01]: frequency>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at least every 12 months, or when there are significant incidents or significant changes to risks

assessment_objectives.objective: the following security requirements are enforced to protect against supply chain risks to the system, system components, or system services and to limit the harm or consequences of supply chain-related events: <A.03.17.03.ODP[01]: security requirements>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at a minimum, integrate Supply Chain Risk Management (SCRM) into  acquisition/procurement policies, provide adequate SCRM resources, define the SCRM control baseline, establish processes to ensure suppliers disclose significant vulnerabilities and significant incidents
